case_title: PAUL BOSCHETTI VS. JESSICA L. DUTTON et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCHETTI, PAUL ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DUTTON, JESSICA L. GOLDSMITH, VIOLET

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-18-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT VIOLET GODSMITH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THE FILINGS FEES FOR JESSICA L. DUTTON WERE DENIED. HOWEVER, THERE ARE NO FILINGS TO STRIKE AT THIS TIME FOR THIS DEFENDANT.
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THE FILINGS FEES FOR VIOLET GOLDSMITH WERE DENIED. HOWEVER, THERE ARE NO FILINGS TO STRIKE AT THIS TIME FOR THIS DEFENDANT.

ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT DUTTON, JESSICA L.
